---
title: ""
page-layout: full
body-classes: index-page
---

::: {.hero-section #top}
::: {.hero-left}
::: {.eyebrow}
Business Analytics Student | DCU
:::

# SOPHIA SUFEI CHEN

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Aspiring Business Analyst & Marketing Planner | Final Year Business Studies Student at DCU | Accounting Assistant Intern | ACCA Student | Chinese & English
:::

::: {.hero-buttons}
[View Portfolio](projects/index.qmd){.primary-btn}
[Download CV](cv.pdf){.secondary-btn target="_blank"}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophiasufei-chen-389591233){.secondary-btn target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.hero-stats}
::: {.stat-box}
### 2026
Expected Graduation
:::

::: {.stat-box}
### ACCA
In Progress
:::

::: {.stat-box}
### PTB
Internship Experience
:::

::: {.stat-box}
### 2
Languages
:::
:::
:::

::: {.hero-right}
![](images/hero.jpg){.hero-image}
:::
:::

## About Me {#about}

::: {.about-grid}
::: {.about-image}
![](images/profile.jpg){.profile-image}
:::

::: {.about-text}
### Professional Profile

I am a final year Business Studies student at Dublin City University, specialising in Business Analytics and Marketing Planning. I am currently working as an Accounting Assistant Intern at PTB Accounting LTD, where I am gaining practical experience in accounting support, financial documentation, and day-to-day business operations.

In addition to my academic studies, I am also pursuing ACCA, which is helping me strengthen my knowledge of accounting, finance, and professional practice. My education and internship experience have helped me build a solid foundation in business analysis, commercial awareness, and problem-solving.

I am interested in opportunities in business analysis, marketing, finance support, and graduate roles where I can continue learning, contribute effectively, and grow in a professional environment.

[More About Me](about_more.html){.secondary-btn .small-btn}
:::
:::

## Background {#background}

::: {.background-grid}
::: {.background-image}
![](images/background.jpg){.feature-image}
:::

::: {.background-text}
### Academic and Professional Development

My background combines university study with practical experience in customer service, retail operations, and accounting support. These experiences have helped me develop strong communication, teamwork, organisation, and problem-solving skills in professional environments.

Through my studies, I have also developed growing confidence in business systems, analytics tools, and data-driven decision-making. I am especially interested in how businesses can improve performance through better use of information, digital tools, and customer understanding.
:::
:::

## Core Skills {#skills}

::: {.skills-grid}
::: {.skill-card}
### Analytics Tools
Excel  
SQL  
Python  
Jamovi
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Business Tools
PowerPoint  
Word  
Xero
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Professional Skills
Communication  
Teamwork  
Multitasking  
Time Management
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Accounting & Finance
Accounting Support  
Financial Documentation  
ACCA Learning
:::
:::

## Portfolio {#projects}

::: {.portfolio-grid}
::: {.portfolio-text}
### Selected Portfolio Work

This portfolio highlights three main projects that reflect different dimensions of my academic and professional development: marketing analysis, business intelligence, and quantitative risk analysis. Together, they show how I combine structured thinking, analytical tools, and professional presentation.

The projects demonstrate my experience with Excel, SQL-informed logic, Power BI dashboard storytelling, and quantitative analysis using financial and business data.

[Open Portfolio](projects/index.html){.primary-btn .small-btn}
:::

::: {.portfolio-image}
![](images/project.jpg){.feature-image}
:::
:::

## Media {#media}

::: {.media-intro}
A curated selection of video resources that support my learning in business analytics, ACCA, and professional English development.
:::

::: {.media-grid}
::: {.media-card}
<div class="video-wrap">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/9fFQA-JOXA0" title="What Is Business Analytics? | Business: Explained" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### Business Analytics

This video gives a clear introduction to business analytics and helps explain how data can support better business decisions.
:::

::: {.media-card}
<div class="video-wrap">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Dm8AEZECc5E" title="What Is ACCA? | Benefits of Obtaining the ACCA Qualification" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### ACCA Learning

This resource supports my understanding of the ACCA pathway, its global value, and the professional opportunities it creates in finance and accounting.
:::

::: {.media-card}
<div class="video-wrap">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/5ZQ65RbsAB8" title="Young women on social media ⏲️ 6 Minute English" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### English Learning

This English learning video helps me strengthen listening, vocabulary, and communication skills, which are important for study and professional growth.
:::
:::

::: {.custom-footer #contact}
::: {.footer-grid}
::: {.footer-block}
#### Contact

Dublin, Ireland

[chen.sophiasufei2@mail.dcu.ie](mailto:chen.sophiasufei2@mail.dcu.ie)
:::

::: {.footer-block .footer-center}
#### Connect

::: {.social-icons}
[DCU](mailto:chen.sophiasufei2@mail.dcu.ie){.social-link}
[in](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophiasufei-chen-389591233){.social-link target="_blank"}
[IG](https://www.instagram.com/sooofeiii?igsh=cXkwYWNnMG9iNHU4&utm_source=qr){.social-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.footer-block .footer-right}
#### Portfolio

Designed by Sophia Sufei Chen | 2026
:::
:::
:::
